name: Kahlua Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Melt chocolate and butter in the top of a double boiler, removing from heat and mixing thoroughly with all other ingredients. Pour into a buttered 8-inch square pan.
3. Bake for 30 minutes. Cool in pan.
4. Mix icing ingredients in a saucepan and bring to a boil, stirring constantly. Boil for 1 minute and remove from heat. Add vanilla when cool. Sprinkle over cooled brownie base and sprinkle with chocolate chips.
